   "reasoning": "We need a quick cash injection to avoid drastic cuts. Teachers are already stretched thin, so retention pay can help. Counseling programs are cheap and make good optics. We can't afford a significant new hire right now. Budget transparency will help us prioritize and make tough decisions. Redistributing resources will help other schools that might not be on our radar. I'm willing to take a calculated risk on scholarships to keep kids from dropping out. The attendance mandate is a Band-Aid, but we need to try something.",
